summary: Q1 2026 earnings beat: EPS $2.78 vs $1.63 estimate, revenue $181.5B. AWS +28% YoY to $37.6B. Meta signed AWS Graviton5 deal; Anthropic committed $100B+ over 10 years to AWS.
